negative_search_evidence.missing_behavior: No audited v2.2-port path writes the resolved absolute Phase 2 deadline back into field 6 of precompile_input before creating the async commitment; the port continues to treat that field as an offset.
related_but_insufficient_code: The port derives scheduled parent context for scheduled async transactions, but does not rewrite field 6 of precompile_input before commitment creation.
AsyncTxMetadata::awaiting_execution stores max_poll_block by reading phase2_deadline_offset from precompile_input, and mark_awaiting_delivery computes settlement_block + offset later.
ritual-precompile-codecs validates Phase 2 deadline as an offset greater than ttl, not as an already resolved absolute deadline.

notes: The active port has scheduled parent-context handling, but not the field-6 mutation required by this invariant.
rationale: The commit adds write_field_6_resolved and uses final_input in AsyncCallResult::new for scheduled two-phase calls; verifier and async pool comments and extraction functions now state that commitment precompile_input already contains the resolved absolute deadline and simply extract the raw field. No candidate in this bounded assignment contradicts or removes it.
statement: For scheduled two-phase async commitments, the detector must write the resolved absolute Phase 2 deadline back into field 6 of precompile_input before creating the AsyncCallResult, so downstream verifier, pool, contract, and executor logic read an absolute deadline.
suggested_falsification_tests: Create a scheduled two-phase commitment from input whose field 6 is an offset; inspect the commitment's precompile_input and assert field 6 contains commit_block + offset, then verify the block verifier and async pool read that field directly as the absolute deadline.
summary: Resolved scheduled Phase 2 deadlines are not written into commitment input.
test_or_falsification_candidate: Create a scheduled two-phase commitment from input whose field 6 is an offset; inspect the commitment's precompile_input and assert field 6 contains commit_block + offset, then verify the block verifier and async pool read that field directly as the absolute deadline.
title: Commitment input stores resolved deadline
